author: florianwoelki
description: Prettify the symbols with actual symbols you commonly type, like arrows.

manifest.author: Florian Woelki
manifest.description: This plugin allows you to prettify the symbols with actual symbols you commonly type, like arrows.
manifest.name: Symbols Prettifier

name: Symbols Prettifier

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* feat: added "not equals" symbol by @MarkusLarsson421 in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-symbols-prettifier/pull/21

## New Contributors
* @MarkusLarsson421 made their first contribution in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-symbols-prettifier/pull/21

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-symbols-prettifier/compare/1.2.3...1.2.4

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* refactor: improve efficiency for state for allowed and excluded types
* fix: issue with transforming symbols in inline code and live view #17 
* build: improve dev system

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* feat: add +-, -+, >=. =< by @robtherobot12 in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-symbols-prettifier/pull/20

## New Contributors
* @robtherobot12 made their first contribution in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-symbols-prettifier/pull/20

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-symbols-prettifier/compare/1.2.1...1.2.2

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* refactor: update README.md, remove unsupported symbols by @kesslerj in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-symbols-prettifier/pull/15
* fix: `<->` symbol rendering problem by prioritizing `<->` in regex by @xloc in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-symbols-prettifier/pull/18

## New Contributors
* @kesslerj made their first contribution in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-symbols-prettifier/pull/15
* @xloc made their first contribution in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-symbols-prettifier/pull/18

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-symbols-prettifier/compare/1.2.0...1.2.1

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- feat: removing old functionality with brand new editor functionality (resolves issues like #12 and #11)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-symbols-prettifier/compare/1.1.4...1.2.0

- Fix: minor issues with matching pattern of inline code

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release includes the following changes:
* Fix issue with `?unclear` symbol and text color
* Upgrade dependencies

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
This release includes the following changes:
* Use `editorCallback` instead of `callback` for commands
* Added `?unclear` and `!important` prettifier

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description: Initial release to prettify your symbols.
